section.title: NAME
section.p: getCS - Return the quotation of a specified collection space.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Return the quotation of a specified collection space.

plentry.pd:
Collection space name. Collection space names are unique to each other in a database instance.
Format The definition formant of getCS() method only have name param, it is a string type. ("<collectionspace name>")

ul.li: the value of param name can't be null, contain dot(.) or '$', the length of it must be not more than 127B.
The collectionspace must be existed in the database.

section.title: Examples
section.p: Supposing that the collection space "foo" exists, it will return the quotation of it.
